message:
refactor: standardize FCP protocol loop in anthropic, datadog, gmail, notion, openai, slack

Extract run_fcp_loop_with_io<R,W> for testability in anthropic and slack
connectors. Add should_skip_protocol_line (whitespace-tolerant) and
parse_error_response (JSON-RPC 2.0 envelope) to all 6 connectors.

Minor fixes:
- anthropic/client.rs: inline format arg in SSE buffer overflow message
- anthropic/tests: update v3_lifecycle test for protocol loop changes
- gmail/client.rs: sort imports, make with_retry_config const
- slack/client.rs: make with_retry_config const
- slack/error.rs: minor formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -79,7 +79,7 @@ impl SlackClient {
 
     /// Set retry configuration.
     #[must_use]
-    pub fn with_retry_config(
+    pub const fn with_retry_config(
         mut self,
         max_retries: u32,
         initial_delay_ms: u64,
